# GalleryItem

**Object**

An object used in a gallery or mosaic component for displaying an individual image.

## Declaration

```swift
object GalleryItem
```

## Discussion

Use an array of `GalleryItem` objects to define the individual items used in a gallery or mosaic component. When the user taps an image in a gallery or mosaic to see it full-screen (as shown in the following figure), the caption from the caption descriptor property is shown. Note that this is different from the [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Caption] component.



This object can be used in [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Gallery] and [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Mosaic].

### Example

```json
{
  "components": [
    {
      "role": "gallery",
      "items": [
        {
          "URL": "bundle://gallery-01.jpg",
          "caption": "Thanks to the record drought, mountain lions have begun to descend from the peaks, sometimes into urban settings."
        },
        {
          "URL": "bundle://gallery-02.jpg",
          "caption": "Coyotes are also seen in cities more often."
        },
        {
          "URL": "bundle://gallery-03.jpg",
          "explicitContent": true
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## Related Documentation

- **Adding a Gallery of Images**: Display three images as a sequential gallery.
- **Adding a Mosaic of Images**: Display five images as mosaic tiles.

## Galleries and Mosaics

- **Gallery**: The component for displaying a sequence of images in a specific order as a horizontal strip.
- **Mosaic**: The component for displaying a set of images as tiles in no particular order.
